text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The arena is roaring with life on the<n>day of the
Japan Cup. The seats are<n>filled with celebrating
spectators, not<n>a vacancy to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I make my descent! Behold—this is<n>beauty,
perfected! Be amazed at my<n>power!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The soon-to-be Centurial Overlord<n>faces off with
her eternal nemesis,<n>the Dark Tempest Lord...
Doto.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
My path has led me to the Japan<n>Cup, where my
pride as ruler is on<n>the line. And now, it begins!
